notes: Corrin's display name, gender, boon, bane, and Talent are selected by the player.
Corrin begins with the Bronze Sword in the Prologue, then receives Ganglari in Chapter 2, the Dragonstone in Chapter 5, and Yato in Chapter 6.
Corrin's Dragonstone weapon rank is absent during the early game and appears at D after Dragonstone access unlocks in Chapter 5.
supportNotes: Corrin can support every normally playable character. Same-gender A supports unlock Friendship Seal access without choosing a single A+ partner; opposite-gender S supports unlock Partner Seal access, with Niles and Rhajat as same-gender S-support exceptions.

To keep every child paralogue obtainable, male Corrin must marry a female Corrin-exclusive partner (a Corrinsexual) or a female offspring unit other than Kana. Marrying a standard first-generation bachelorette leaves another father's child paralogue permanently unavailable; marrying Niles also prevents Kana and Nina's paralogues.

notes: Felicia has the effect of four built-in Eternal Seals, allowing her to reach level 40 despite starting in the promoted Maid class.
Recruit Mozu by talking to her with Corrin in Paralogue 1.
Mozu begins with Aptitude, which adds 10% to every growth rate. The personal growth values shown above exclude this skill bonus.
Mozu cannot access Apothecary, but she still reaches Merchant through Villager and can access Mechanist through a Ninja seal grant.
In Conquest Chapter 16, spare Shura to recruit him; killing him instead awards Boots.
In Revelation Chapter 15, recruit Shura by talking to him with Corrin.
Ryoma is a temporary guest in Birthright Chapter 6 and cannot gain EXP there.
Hinoka is a temporary guest in Birthright Chapter 6 and cannot gain EXP there.
In Birthright Chapter 8, Corrin can recruit Hinoka during the map; she also joins at the end if she survives.
Takumi is a temporary guest in Birthright Chapter 6 and cannot gain EXP there.
In Birthright Chapter 10, Azura can recruit Takumi during the map; he joins automatically at the end even if defeated.
Takumi is unavailable for deployment in Birthright Chapter 16.

Sakura is playable in Chapter 5 before the route split. In Revelation, she leaves after Chapter 5 and rejoins at the end of Chapter 8 using her stronger level 4 Revelation template while retaining the levels, rolled stat gains, partial EXP, and staff proficiency earned in Chapter 5.
In Revelation Chapter 11, Corrin can recruit Saizo during the map; he also joins at the end if he survives.
Setsuna joins in Birthright Chapter 8 when Hinoka is recruited, provided she is still alive.
Azama joins in Birthright Chapter 8 when Hinoka is recruited, provided he is still alive.
In Birthright Chapter 9, Corrin can recruit Hinata during the map; he also joins at the end if he survives.
In Birthright Chapter 9, Corrin can recruit Oboro during the map; she also joins at the end if she survives.

Rinkah is playable in Chapters 4 and 5 before the route split. In Revelation, she leaves after Chapter 5 and rejoins at the start of Chapter 9 with her level, EXP, stats, and weapon proficiency from Chapter 5 retained.
In Revelation Chapter 11, Orochi joins alongside Saizo when Corrin talks to him, or at the end if both survive.
Reina supports only Corrin.
For EXP calculations, Reina's displayed level is treated as 15 levels higher, equivalent to promoting at level 10 or 11.
In Birthright Chapter 11, Corrin can recruit Reina during the map; she also joins at the end if she survives.
In Revelation Chapter 11, Reina joins alongside Saizo when Corrin talks to him, or at the end if both survive.
Scarlet supports only Corrin.
In Revelation only, Scarlet permanently leaves the playable army at the end of Chapter 18. She remains available normally in Birthright.
Xander is a temporary guest in Conquest Chapter 6 and cannot gain EXP there.
Camilla is a temporary guest in Conquest Chapter 6 and cannot gain EXP there. She permanently joins on turn 3 of Chapter 10.
For EXP calculations, Camilla's displayed level is treated as 15 levels higher, equivalent to an early promotion around level 10 or 11.
Leo is a temporary guest in Conquest Chapter 6 and cannot gain EXP there.
For EXP calculations, Leo's displayed level is treated as 18 levels higher, equivalent to promoting at level 16 or 17.
Elise is a temporary guest in Conquest Chapter 6. She cannot gain EXP there, leaves at the end of the chapter, and permanently joins on turn 3 of Chapter 7.
Uses of Elise's Chapter 6 staves do not carry forward; her Heal and Freeze return at full durability when she permanently joins in Chapter 7.
Elise is unavailable for deployment in Conquest Chapter 12 because she is incapacitated by illness.

Localization note: Aching Blood has a different activation condition in the Japanese release. The English version requires a forged weapon name at least 12 characters long; Japanese 血の疼き requires all eight available name characters to be kanji.
Talk to Nyx with Corrin to recruit her in both Conquest Chapter 9 and Revelation Chapter 15.
In Conquest Chapter 14, Corrin must talk to Keaton to recruit him.
Gunter is temporarily playable in Chapter 2 on all routes, leaves after Chapter 3, and never returns in Birthright.

Whether Chapter 2-3 EXP progress, level gains, and weapon proficiency carry into his Conquest or Revelation return remains unverified. The displayed return blocks use the published fixed joining states until a controlled in-game test confirms the carryover behavior.
supportNotes: Gunter cannot initiate support conversations or receive support bonuses in Revelation; his Corrin and Jakob supports are Conquest-only.

notes: Flora becomes recruitable in Conquest after Chapter 18 once the Fire Orb reaches level 3 and My Castle refreshes. In Revelation, she becomes recruitable after Chapter 22 once any Ballista, Fire Orb, or Launcher reaches level 3 and My Castle refreshes.
Waiting for the real-time refresh or completing any map can advance the refresh; recruitment is not locked to completing the next story chapter.
Flora starts gaining automatic levels in Chapter 23 and reaches her level 15 cap in Chapter 27; Revelation therefore begins at level 7 after Chapter 22.

Scaled stats use (individual growth rates + Maid class growth rates) from the level 5 base stat block, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Weapon proficiency and learned class skills also scale, but the exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
Scaling details were identified and explained by FE14 modder ltranc@.
Yukimura becomes recruitable in Birthright after Chapter 21 once any Puppet reaches level 3 and My Castle refreshes. Waiting for the real-time refresh or completing any map can advance the refresh.
Yukimura starts gaining automatic levels in Chapter 25 and reaches his level 15 cap in Chapter 27.

Scaled stats use (individual growth rates + Mechanist class growth rates) from the level 10 base stat block, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Weapon proficiency and learned class skills also scale, but the exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
Scaling details were identified and explained by FE14 modder ltranc@.
Yukimura cannot be recruited in Conquest or Revelation, even though Revelation allows level 3 Puppets.
Izana becomes recruitable after the Hot Spring reaches level 3 and My Castle refreshes. A completed map advances the refresh, but simply waiting for the real-time refresh also works.
Izana unlocks after Birthright Chapter 18 or Conquest Chapter 22; he is not locked to the next story chapter.
Izana starts gaining automatic levels in Chapter 23 and reaches his level 15 cap in Chapter 27; Conquest therefore begins at level 7 after Chapter 22.

Scaled stats use (individual growth rates + Onmyoji class growth rates) from the level 5 base stat block, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Weapon proficiency and learned class skills also scale, but the exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
Scaling details were identified and explained by FE14 modder ltranc@.
Izana is an NPC in Revelation and cannot be recruited there.

Fuga is Revelation-exclusive and becomes recruitable after Chapter 18 once the Hot Spring reaches level 3 and My Castle refreshes. Waiting for the real-time refresh or completing any map can advance the refresh.
His minimum level 10 Master of Arms base block, Sword B / Lance C / Axe C ranks, and empty inventory are independently corroborated.
Fuga starts gaining automatic levels in Chapter 25 and reaches his level 15 cap in Chapter 27.

Scaled stats use (individual growth rates + Master of Arms class growth rates) from the level 10 base stat block, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Weapon proficiency and learned class skills also scale, but the exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
Scaling details were identified and explained by FE14 modder ltranc@.
Anna is a paid DLC-exclusive unit recruited by clearing Anna on the Run for the first time after the Dragon's Gate is unlocked.

The NPC Anna inside Anna on the Run scales from level 10 to 18 with story progress, but that NPC scaling does not carry into the recruited unit. Recruited Anna always joins with the fixed level 10 data shown below.
supportNotes: Anna's only first-generation support partner is Corrin; she can also support Kana if she is Kana's mother.

notes: Kana's gender is always opposite Corrin's. The selected spouse resolves Kana's growths, caps, traits, class inheritance, sibling, and support bonuses.
If Corrin marries an offspring unit, that spouse's own variable parent must also be selected before Kana's inherited data is fully resolved.
Male Corrin with Niles or female Corrin with Rhajat does not unlock Dragon Blood and produces no Kana.
Shigure is Azura's fixed offspring unit; selecting Azura's S-support partner resolves his father-dependent growths, caps, traits, sibling, class access, and support bonuses.
If Jakob is Shigure's father, Jakob supplies Troubadour first and Azura's inheritance resolves to Wyvern Rider instead.
Dwyer begins Fight or Flight as an allied NPC. Jakob can recruit him by talking to him; Dwyer also joins after the map if he survives.
His level, recruitment bases, and Offspring Seal outcome depend on story progress and the selected variable parent.

pairupRule.note: Corrin's support-based Attack Stance and Guard Stance bonuses are determined by the selected boon and bane rather than a fixed unit table. Rank bonuses are incremental and cumulative.

attackStance.semantics: The base bonus applies with no support. Each rank then adds the selected variant's delta, cumulatively through the reached support rank.

guardStance.semantics: Pair Up discards Attack Stance support-unit boosts and applies a standard Dodge +5. Personal stat deltas are cumulative across C, B, A, and S and are added to class Pair Up stats.

recruitmentNotes: Kana appears during Dragon Blood as an uncontrolled dragon NPC; the playable Nohr Prince or Princess joins after the chapter ends.

baseStatFormula.childAptitude: child personal base + automatic-growth stat gains
baseStatFormula.promotedClassAptitude: promoted-class growth rate * (automatic-growth levels beyond the unpromoted cap - 1) / 100
baseStatFormula.parentInheritanceValue: max(0, parent personal base + parent level-up gains - child aptitude - promoted-class aptitude)
baseStatFormula.parentStatInput: Use only the parent's fixed personal value plus stat points earned through level-ups. Exclude class bases, permanent stat-booster items, Pair Up, equipment, meals, tonics, statues, and other external bonuses.
baseStatFormula.inheritanceBonus: min(floor((father inheritance value + mother inheritance value) / 4), floor(2 + child aptitude / 10))
baseStatFormula.finalStat: child personal base + current class base + automatic-growth stat gains + inheritance bonus
baseStatFormula.rounding: Floor the inheritance division and cap; round the promoted-class aptitude to the nearest integer with exact halves rounded up.
baseStatFormula.offspringSealNote: For an unpromoted child, promoted-class aptitude is zero and the formula reduces to the commonly circulated C form. Offspring Seal calculations must split the promoted-class aptitude instead of treating every level as one N * combined-growth term.

mapLevelScaling.note: Children use internal level 10. Before promotion, their displayed level follows the applicable map level once it exceeds 10. From Chapter 19 onward, the Offspring Seal promotes them and converts map level 22-38 into promoted level 2-18 by subtracting the promoted internal-level offset of 20.

provenance.locator: Kana > Fates recruitment, inventory, and starting ranks

notes: Shigure is Azura's fixed offspring unit; selecting Azura's S-support partner resolves his father-dependent growths, caps, traits, sibling, class access, and support bonuses.
If Jakob is Shigure's father, Jakob supplies Troubadour first and Azura's inheritance resolves to Wyvern Rider instead.

notes: Shigure always inherits Dragon Vein access from Azura. Corrin adds the Dragon unit trait; Kaden or Keaton adds the Beast unit trait.
The selected father's linked offspring becomes Shigure's sibling and replaces any friendship or romantic support between them.
Jakob is the class-inheritance exception: Jakob gives Shigure Troubadour, so Azura's otherwise duplicated inheritance resolves to Wyvern Rider.

This conflicts with the specialist Japanese Pegasus Knight support matrix and a localized-game test, both of which report that no support occurs at all.

sources.notes: The specialist support matrix explicitly states that if Corrin marries one of Azura's offspring, Kana of either gender cannot initiate any support with Azura's other offspring, even when they are opposite genders. It gives Female Kana and Shigure as an example.

sources.title: Localized Kana and Azura-offspring support test
sources.notes: Firsthand localized Revelation report says Male Kana could not support Azura!Midori at all after Female Corrin married Shigure. This independently matches the specialist Japanese Pegasus Knight support matrix.
